articles.title: Ethereum price may have bottomed, but pro traders show little interest in buying ETH
articles.description: Ether (ETH) price has risen 6. 4% from its March 30 $1,768 low but the altcoin has struggled to regain the $2,000 level. Some traders believe that the downturn is partially connected to the deflating memecoin market, which, while not exclusive to the Ethereum network, significantly reduced activity across the decentralized applications (DApps) ecosystem and broader crypto space. Ether is currently 44% down year-to-date, and derivatives metrics indicate that traders are far from bullish and show

articles.title: Kraken Announces Support for RLUSD As Stablecoin Integrates Into Ripple’s Payment’s Network
articles.description: Kraken, the second-largest US-based crypto exchange by trading volume, is adding support for Ripple’s stablecoin. In a new announcement, Kraken says that Ripple USD (RLUSD) is now available to trade on its platform. RLUSD is a US dollar-backed digital asset issued on Ripple’s XRP Ledger and Ethereum (ETH) blockchains

articles.title: Pump.fun launches lending platform to finance memecoin buys
articles.description: Pump. fun is launching a lending platform to enable users to buy memecoins and non-fungible tokens (NFTs) with borrowed cryptocurrency, the Solana-based memecoin launchpad said. articles.title: Ethereum Whale Activity Plummets as Large Transactions Drop 63.8% Since Late February
articles.description: An OG Ethereum investor sold 2,001 ETH worth $3. 82M on April 2nd amidst declining whale activity and price struggles.

articles.title: Analyst Benjamin Cowen warns Ethereum could drop another 50%
articles.description: Ethereum’s underperformance is part of a bigger macro story — and it might not be over yet.
